CustomField.description: This field automatically fills with the current active Lease record linked to this Asset, identified by the 'Active' field (leaseworks__Active__c) set to 'True'. In the absence of an active Lease on this Asset (following the described logic), the system will clear this field. [This process is executed through a scheduled job that runs daily.]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is automatically filled with the current active Lease record linked to this Asset, determined by the 'Active' field being set to 'True'. If there is no active Lease associated with this Asset (following the logic described), the system will clear this field.
CustomField.label: Lease

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Selected Lease has already different Asset assigned, please change the Lease before saving this Asset
